mission.title: argo-workflows: TLS configuration and/or docs enhancement
mission.description: TLS configuration and/or docs enhancement. This issue affects 25+ users.

steps.title: Identify argo-workflows troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your argo-workflows deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-workflows
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-workflows -n argo-workflows --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review argo-workflows configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant argo-workflows configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-workflows
kubectl get configmap -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=argo-workflows
```
After the 3.0 release, argo-server listens on HTTPS with a self-signed certificate by default. Check whether TLS certificates are properly configured via a Kubernetes Secret mounted into the argo-server pod.

steps.title: Apply the fix for TLS configuration and/or docs enhancement
steps.description:
Configure TLS for argo-server by mounting cert-manager secrets. Secrets from cert-manager contain a `ca.crt` which is added to the certificate trusts, allowing privately signed certificates to be used.

```yaml
volumeMounts:
  - mountPath: /tmp
    name: tmp
  - mountPath: /home/argo/argo-server.crt
    name: tls
    readOnly: true
    subPath: argo-server.crt
  - mountPath: /home/argo/argo-server.key
    name: tls
    readOnly: true
    subPath: argo-server.key
securityContext:
  fsGroup: 8737
  runAsNonRoot: true
volumes:
- emptyDir: {}
  name: tmp
- name: tls
  secret:
    defaultMode: 420
    items:
    - key: tls.crt
      path: argo-server.crt
    - key: tls.key
      path: argo-server.key
    secretName: argo-secret
```

steps.title: Confirm TLS configuration and/or docs enhancement is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-workflows -n argo-workflows --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n argo-workflows --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary: Configure argo-server TLS by mounting cert-manager secrets (tls.crt, tls.key, ca.crt) into the pod. The ca.crt is added to certificate trusts, enabling privately signed certificates. Use an Ingress with ssl-passthrough to terminate TLS at the argo-server.
codeSnippets:
volumeMounts:
        - mountPath: /tmp
          name: tmp
        - mountPath: /home/argo/argo-server.crt
          name: tls
          readOnly: true
          subPath: argo-server.crt
        - mountPath: /home/argo/argo-server.key
          name: tls
          readOnly: true
          subPath: argo-server.key
      securityContext:
        fsGroup: 8737
        runAsNonRoot: true
      volumes:
      - emptyDir: {}
        name: tmp
      - name: tls
        secret:
          defaultMode: 420
          items:
          - key: tls.crt
            path: argo-server.crt
          - key: tls.key
            path: argo-server.key
          secretName: argo-secret

apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: argo-server-ingress
  namespace: argo
  labels:
    "use-http01-solver": "true"
  annotations:
    cert-manager.io/cluster-issuer: letsencrypt-prod
    kubernetes.io/ingress.class: nginx
    kubernetes.io/tls-acme: "true"
    nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/ssl-passthrough: "true"
spec:
  rules:
  - host: argo.somedomain.com
    http:
      paths:
      - pathType: Prefix
        path: /
        backend:
          service:
            name: argo-server
            port:
              name: web
  tls:
  - hosts:
    - argo.somedomain.com
    secretName: argo-secret

volumeMounts:
        - mountPath: /argo-server.crt
          name: tls
          readOnly: true
          subPath: argo-server.crt
        - mountPath: /argo-server.key
          name: tls
          readOnly: true
          subPath: argo-server.key
      securityContext:
        fsGroup: 8737
      volumes:
      - name: tls
        secret:
          items:
          - key: tls.crt
            path: argo-server.crt
          - key: tls.key
            path: argo-server.key
          secretName: argo-secret

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with argo-workflows installed or the issue environment reproducible.
